summary: High‑energy show with standout versions of Loser and Help > Slip > Franklin's, captured on a crisp soundboard recording
review: Fans rave about the spring‑tour energy of this March ’90 Knickerbocker performance, calling it “heavy‑metal dead” with monster renditions of The Loser and the Help‑Slip‑Franklin’s sequence. The soundboard source is praised as great and clear, though some note that audience (AUD) copies are only okay on a home stereo.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly enthusiastic reviews highlight an exceptional performance and generally excellent soundboard quality; minor audio‑quality caveats do not detract from the overall high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally crisp and clear soundboard capture; reviewers describe it as a great recording, with only brief comments that audience (AUD) versions are merely adequate on house‑stereo systems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy throughout both sets – first set fires up the crowd, second set sustains momentum with heavy‑metal‑tinged jams and superb transitions.
